zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Hughes於1295年出生在英國英格蘭素瑞莫萊 瓦利時，她的父親John Hughes30歲，母親Maud de Haselden17歲。她於1320年與Sir Richard de Barton de Wallop在英國英格蘭維爾爾卡爾內結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1395年在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Hughes was born in 1295, in Mole Valley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hughes, was 30 and her mother, Maud de Haselden, was 17. She married Sir Richard de Barton de Wallop in 1320, in Calne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1395, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Hughes est née en 1295, à Mole Valley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hughes, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maud de Haselden, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard de Barton de Wallop en 1320, à Calne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1395, à Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Hughesが1295年にイギリスイギリススリーモル ヴァリーで生まれた時，父John Hughesは30歳，母Maud de Haseldenは17歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカルンでSir Richard de Barton de Wallopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1395年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアネスエル ワロップで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Hughes(이)가 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 모일 발리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hughes(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Haselden(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 캘니에서 Sir Richard de Barton de Wallop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Hughes родилась в 1295 г. в местности мол валли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hughes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Haselden, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard de Barton de Wallop в 1320 г. в местности калн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1395 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет.
